_comment: Integration config for GRD (winning route G1: definite-core learning).
SEPARATE per-semantics file because solver_policy.get_background_file and
get_show_predicates are GLOBAL-only today; run train_test with
is bg_nochoice_grd.lp = background_knowledge.lp MINUS the two choice rules
0{in(X)}1 / 0{out(X)}1, so the hypothesis must DERIVE in/out.
clingo_args are PLAIN everywhere (grounded.lp is a definite program; the
old domRec flags did nothing on the oracle and poisoned the learned side).
learn_heuristics=false (the old GRD entry had true).
NOTE: the ILASP task background is still hardcoded to background_knowledge.lp
in generate_ilasp_task.py; the integration driver strips the choice rules
from the generated task (see run_integration.py; repo patch documented there).
